_metadata.description: Open WebUI pipeline filters configuration for AI OS

input_filters.name: context_loader
input_filters.description: Load memory and knowledge context before inference

input_filters.description: Classify request complexity to route to planner

input_filters.name: token_budget_enforcer
input_filters.description: Enforce token budget limits before sending to NIM
